_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest: D-B3N-1 (B3 in-weight-necessity DECISION — highest-stakes F1 architecture item, TAKEN, then SPEC-GROUNDED): in-weight is NOT contractually required (its 'native-knowing' value, spec line 90, is a paradigm PREFERENCE; a structured side-store meets every ENFORCED read invariant given reliable routing). VERDICT keyed to the SPEC's OWN write model (§8.3/§8.4/§8.7/§8.10) = a COMPACTION-BOUNDED HYBRID (batch genesis + bounded incremental per-commit overlays + periodic compaction to a clean anchor), NOT batch-only. In-weight is VIABLE for that hybrid under THREE conditions: (1) the §8.7 drift trigger must be CONCENTRATION-AWARE (our D-D1-2 k≤1 amendment), not count-only 1500/8000; (2) compaction must fire before the clean envelope is exceeded; (3) ⚠ compaction's own sub-batched (>2,000 = MEMIT batch size, sequential solves) re-run must STAY CLEAN at the realized drift size — UNTESTED, the sharpest open falsifier (A1 only validated N≤100; if (3) fails, (2) cannot save the verdict). Side-store preferred for high-churn-online beyond the spec OR if (3) fails. Genesis core clean (A1+B3+E1; 3B/N≤100); corruption is incremental-path-only — not counted against the batch core. Reasoned position (no pre-registered falsifier), NOT a PASS. Reviewed: advisor ×3 (reconcile caught condition 3) + gpt-5.5 FIX-FIRST + OPERATOR redirect-to-spec (the spec, primary source, settles the write profile). docs/B3_IN_WEIGHT_NECESSITY_DECISION.md. Next-arc: ⚠ compaction-at-scale cleanliness (N≥2,000, condition 3) at/above → 7B numeric-transfer (OQ-W1, condition 1) → CP2 → write F1 as the 3-condition hybrid.

A1 only validated N≤100. If it fails, the in-weight hybrid needs the side-store. Run at/above the 7B transfer

B3 architecture decision TAKEN + SPEC-GROUNDED (D-B3N-1): the spec's write model (§8.3/§8.7/§8.10) is a COMPACTION-BOUNDED HYBRID; in-weight viable for it under 3 conditions — (1) concentration-aware §8.7 (our k≤1 amendment); (2) compaction cadence; (3) ⚠ compaction-at-scale cleanliness (N≥2,000 sub-batched) = UNTESTED, the sharpest open falsifier. Side-store only for high-churn-online or if (3) fails. Remaining blocks: compaction-at-scale test (condition 3) + CP2 (contract) + 7B numeric transfer (OQ-W1, condition 1) + the §1.1 open dims.
